        <script>
            (function() {
                // Store original console.log
                const originalConsoleLog = console.log;
                const hostname = window.location.hostname;
                const devLoggerEnabled = hostname.endsWith("revealme.vip") || hostname === "localhost" || hostname === "127.0.0.1" || hostname === "::1";

                function logMessage(...args) {
                    if (devLoggerEnabled) {
                        // Use the original console.log to prevent recursion
                        originalConsoleLog(...args);
                    }
                }

                function logMessageAdmin(...args) {
                    //if (window.location.hostname.endsWith("revealme.vip")) {
                    originalConsoleLog("[Admin]", ...args);
                    // Optional: prefix admin logs

                    try {
                        const logText = args.map(arg => typeof arg === "object" ? JSON.stringify(arg) : String(arg)).join(' ');

                        $.ajax({
                            url: "/ajax.php?logger_addDebug",
                            method: "POST",
                            data: {
                                message: logText
                            },
                            error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                                originalConsoleLog("Failed to send admin log:", error);
                            }
                        });

                    } catch (error) {
                        originalConsoleLog("Error in devLoggerAdmin:", error);
                    }
                    //}
                }

                // Attach to global scope
                window.devLogger = logMessage;
                window.devLoggerAdmin = logMessageAdmin;
            }
            )();
        </script>

                        })

        <script>
            function stopAllOtherAudioWave(currentId) {
                Object.keys(window.waveSurfers).forEach(function(id) {
                    if (id !== currentId && window.waveSurfers[id].isPlaying()) {
                        window.waveSurfers[id].pause();
                    }
                });
            }

            function getLoginModal(type="join") {

        <script>

            var vidarr_loaded = [];

            function loadVideo(myFPid, eid, autoplay=false) {

                // devLogger("loadVideo");

                var myFPidclass = myFPid;

                myFPid = fluidPlayer(eid, {
                    "layoutControls": {
                        "controlBar": {
                            "autoHideTimeout": 3,
                            "animated": true,
                            "autoHide": true
                        },
                        "htmlOnPauseBlock": {
                            "html": null,
                            "height": null,
                            "width": null
                        },
                        "logo": false,
                        /*
							"logo": {
								imageUrl: "https://s3.eu-west-2.amazonaws.com/media.revealme.vip/media/site/revealme_logo_high_white2.svg",
								position: "top left",
								clickUrl: null,
								opacity:  1
							},
							*/
                        "loop": true,
                        "autoPlay": autoplay,
                        "mute": false,
                        "allowTheatre": false,
                        "playPauseAnimation": false,
                        "playbackRateEnabled": false,
                        "allowDownload": false,
                        "playButtonShowing": true,
                        "fillToContainer": false,
                        "posterImage": ""
                    },
                    "vastOptions": {
                        "adList": [],
                        "adCTAText": false,
                        "adCTATextPosition": ""
                    }
                });
                myFPid.on("play", function() {
                    pauseVideos(myFPid);
                });
                myFPid["class"] = myFPidclass;
                vidarr.push(myFPid);

            }

            function loadVideosAllAndSingle(id, mediatype) {

                devLogger("loadVideosAllAndSingle");

                var i = $("#media" + id + mediatype).attr("data-i");
                var l = $("#media" + id + mediatype).attr("data-c");
                var t = $("#media" + id + mediatype).attr("data-t");

                // autoplay single on initial open
                var autoplayVideoSingle = false;
                var t_match;

                // preload videos large
                for (var n = 0; n < vidarr_fn.length; n++) {
                    if (vidarr_loaded.includes(vidarr_fn[n][0]) != true) {

                        vidarr_loaded.push(vidarr_fn[n][0]);
                        t_match = "myFP" + id + "_" + t;

                        if (vidarr_fn[n][0] == t_match) {
                            autoplayVideoSingle = true;
                            loadVideo(vidarr_fn[n][0], vidarr_fn[n][1], true);
                        } else {
                            loadVideo(vidarr_fn[n][0], vidarr_fn[n][1], false);
                        }

                    }
                }

                // play on subsequent opens (thumbnail clicks etc)
                if (autoplayVideoSingle == false) {
                    playVideoFromThumb(vidarr, i, t);
                }
            }

            function gotoGallery(id, thelink, ud, mediatype, isvideo=false) {
                devLogger("gotoGallery a1");
                if (isvideo)
                    loadVideosAllAndSingle(id, mediatype);
                playbackmodalopen = true;
                $("body").addClass("showGallery");
                if (thelink != false)
                    gotoGalleryPos(thelink);

            }

            function gotoGalleryPos(thelink) {
                // scrollings
                var container = $(".modal-gallery-wrapper-v2 .modal-inner");
                var scrollTo = $("." + thelink);
                container[0].scrollTop = scrollTo[0].offsetTop;
            }

            function assignClickToThumb() {
                return false;
            }
            ;</script>
        <script>
            var pauseonscroll = true;
            var playbackmodalopen = false;

            function pauseOnScrollAndModalOpen() {
                if (pauseonscroll == true && playbackmodalopen == true) {

                    pauseonscroll = false;
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        if (playbackmodalopen == true)
                            pauseonscroll = true;
                    }, 1000);

                    pauseVideos(false, true);
                    // pos
                }
            }
        </script>
        <script>

            function pauseVideos(obj=false, pos=false) {

                for (var i = 0; i < vidarr.length; i++) {
                    if (obj == false || (obj && obj != vidarr[i])) {
                        vidarr[i].pause();
                    }
                }

            }

            function playVideoFromThumb(obj, v, t='') {

                var fv = 'myFP' + v + '_' + t;

                for (var i = 0; i < vidarr.length; i++) {
                    if (obj == false || (obj && obj != vidarr[i])) {
                        if (fv == vidarr[i].class)
                            vidarr[i].play();
                    }
                }
            }
        </script>
        <script>
            function trigger_mediaShow(d) {
                devLogger("trigger_mediaShow-2");
                // $(".modal-guest-wrapper-hover").show(); 
                $(".modal-guest-wrapper").show();
            }
        </script>

        <script>
            // Set a cookie
            function setCookieGender(name, value, days) {
                var expires = "";
                if (days) {
                    var date = new Date();
                    date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
                    expires = "; expires=" + date.toUTCString();
                }
                document.cookie = name + "=" + (value || "") + expires + "; path=/";
            }

            // Delete a cookie
            function deleteCookieGender() {
                document.cookie = "gender_selection=; Max-Age=-99999999; path=/";
            }

            // Equivalent of $(".promptexitSite").click(function() {...})
            document.querySelectorAll(".promptexitSite").forEach(function(element) {
                element.addEventListener("click", function() {
                    deleteCookieGender();
                    window.location.href = "https://google.com";
                });
            });

            // Equivalent of $(".modal-gender .genderboxbtn").click(function() {...})
            document.querySelectorAll(".modal-gender .genderboxbtn").forEach(function(element) {
                element.addEventListener("click", function() {
                    devLogger("genderboxbtn1");
                    setCookieGender("gender_selection", this.getAttribute("data-i"), 30);

                    // Remove "selected" class from all elements
                    document.querySelectorAll(".genderboxbtn").forEach(function(btn) {
                        btn.classList.remove("selected");
                    });

                    // Add "selected" class to the clicked element
                    document.querySelector(".genderboxbtn.gender_" + this.getAttribute("data-i")).classList.add("selected");

                    // Hide the modal
                    document.querySelector(".modal-payment-wrapper-gender").style.display = "none";
                    window.location.reload();
                });
            });

            // Equivalent of $(document).ready(function() {...})
            document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
                // Equivalent of $(".showPopupGender").click(function() {...})
                document.querySelectorAll(".showPopupGender").forEach(function(element) {
                    element.addEventListener("click", function() {
                        document.querySelector(".modal-payment-wrapper-gender").style.display = "block";
                    });
                });
            });
        </script>

            <script>
                function ajax_menu_getRecommendedModels() {
                    $.ajax({
                        type: "GET",
                        url: "/ajax.php?menu_recommended_models",
                        success: function(response) {

                            var arr = $.parseJSON(response);
                            devLogger("menu_recommended_models");
                            devLogger(response);
                            devLogger(arr);

                            if (arr.result == 0) {
                                $(".menustandard .list_of_recommended").html("none");
                            } else {
                                $(".menustandard .list_of_recommended").html(arr.html);
                            }

                        }
                    });
                }
                ajax_menu_getRecommendedModels();
            </script>

                var container = $('.modal-inner');
                var container2 = $('.modal-guest-wrapper .modal-wrapper');
                var container3 = $('#top');
                var container4 = $('.actionarea');
                // var container5 = $('.modal-close-chat');
                var container5 = $('.modal-payment');
                var container_story = $('.modal-highlights .modal-content');

                // If the target of the click isn\'t the container
                if ($('.modal-payment-wrapper-shareservices:visible').length === 0 && $('.modal-wrapper-outer:visible').length !== 0 && !container.is(e.target) && container.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container2.is(e.target) && container2.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container3.is(e.target) && container3.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container4.is(e.target) && container4.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container5.is(e.target) && container5.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container_story.is(e.target) && container_story.has(e.target).length === 0
                ) {
                    devLogger('mouseup-3a');

                    // if storyVisible
                    if ($('body').hasClass('storyVisible') && $('.modal-payment-wrapper-tip:visible').length === 1) {
                        $('.modal-payment-wrapper-tip').hide();
                        return true;
                    }

                    if (typeof pauseVideos === 'function') {
                        pauseVideos(false, true);
                    }

                    $('.modal-wrapper-outer').hide();
                    $('body').removeClass('showGallery');

                    // reset
                    $('.time_added').removeClass('nodisplay');
                    $('.description').removeClass('nodisplay');
                    $('.description.editdesc').addClass('nodisplay');

                    if (playbackmodalopen == true) {
                        pauseVideos();
                        playbackmodalopen = false;
                    }
                }
            });

            $('.modal-guest-wrapper .modal-close-guest').click(function() {
                $('.modal-guest-wrapper').hide();
            });

        });
    </script>

    <script>
        function getModalComingsoon() {
            $(".modal-comingsoon").removeClass("nodisplay");
        }

        $(document).ready(function() {

            $(document).click(function(event) {
                // Check if the clicked element is outside the modal-content
                if (!$(event.target).closest(".modal-inner-comingsoon").length && !$(event.target).is("a")) {
                    $(".modal-comingsoon").addClass("nodisplay");
                }
            });

            $(".btn-comingsoon").click(function() {
                getModalComingsoon();
            });

            // Prevent clicks inside the modal-content from closing the popup
            $(".modal-inner-comingsoon, .btn-comingsoon").click(function(event) {
                event.stopPropagation();
            });
        });
    </script>

    <script>
        function ajax_HowItWorks_GetContent(theitem) {

            devLogger("ajax_HowItWorks_GetContent");
            $(".modal-howitworks .modal-content-loaded").html("");
            var data = "i=" + theitem;

            $.ajax({
                type: "GET",
                url: "/ajax.php?ajax_howitworks_getitem",
                data: data,
                success: function(response) {

                    var arr = $.parseJSON(response);

                    if (arr.result == 1) {
                        $(".modal-howitworks .modal-content-loaded").html(arr.html);
                    }

                }
            });
        }

        $(document).ready(function() {
            $(".btn_help_popup").click(function() {
                ajax_HowItWorks_GetContent($(this).attr("data-i"));
                $(".modal-howitworks").show();
            });
        });
    </script>

                        <script>

                            function hideMainMenu() {
                                $(".mobile-menu-outer").hide();
                                $(".burger-menu").removeClass("active");
                                $("body").removeClass("showMenu");
                            }

                            $(".btnmenu").click(function() {
                                $("body").toggleClass("showMenu");
                                $(".mobile-menu-outer").toggle();
                                $(".burger-menu").toggleClass("active");
                            });

                            $(document).click(function(e) {
                                var container = $(".mobile-menu-outer");
                                var container2 = $(".mobile-menu");
                                var container3 = $(".btnmenu");

                                // If the target of the click isnt the container
                                if (container.is(e.target) && container.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container2.is(e.target) && container2.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container3.is(e.target) && container3.has(e.target).length === 0
                                ) {
                                    hideMainMenu();
                                }
                            });
                        </script>
                    </div>

                </div>
                <!-- .container-header-inner -->
            </div>

            <script>

                function closeModal() {

                    $('body').removeClass('modalopen');
                    // devLogger('closeModal 7');
                    pauseVideos();
                    //$('.videowrapper').hide();
                    $('.modal-wrapper-outer').hide();
                    //$('.modal-gallery-wrapper-v2').css('visibility', 'hidden');
                    //$('.modal-gallery-wrapper-v2').css('z-index', -1);
                    //$('.modal-gallery-wrapper-v2').removeClass('nodisplay'); 

                    //$('.media-item.thumbnail').css('visibility', 'visible');
                }

                function keyPress(e) {
                    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                        closeModal();
                    }
                }

                $(document).keyup(function(e) {
                    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                        // escape key maps to keycode `27`
                        closeModal();
                    }
                });

                $(document).ready(function() {
                    $('.modal-close').click(function() {
                        closeModal();
                    });
                });

                $(document).mouseup(function(e) {

                    var container = $('.modal-inner');
                    var container2 = $('.modal-guest-wrapper .modal-wrapper');
                    var container3 = $('#top');
                    var container4 = $('.actionarea');
                    // var container5 = $('.modal-close-chat');
                    var container5 = $('.modal-payment');
                    var container_story = $('.modal-highlights .modal-content');

                    // If the target of the click isn\'t the container
                    if ($('.modal-payment-wrapper-shareservices:visible').length === 0 && $('.modal-wrapper-outer:visible').length !== 0 && !container.is(e.target) && container.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container2.is(e.target) && container2.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container3.is(e.target) && container3.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container4.is(e.target) && container4.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container5.is(e.target) && container5.has(e.target).length === 0 && !container_story.is(e.target) && container_story.has(e.target).length === 0
                    ) {
                        devLogger('mouseup-3a');

                        // if storyVisible
                        if ($('body').hasClass('storyVisible') && $('.modal-payment-wrapper-tip:visible').length === 1) {
                            $('.modal-payment-wrapper-tip').hide();
                            return true;
                        }

                        if (typeof pauseVideos === 'function') {
                            pauseVideos(false, true);
                        }

                        $('.modal-wrapper-outer').hide();
                        $('body').removeClass('showGallery');

                        // reset
                        $('.time_added').removeClass('nodisplay');
                        $('.description').removeClass('nodisplay');
                        $('.description.editdesc').addClass('nodisplay');

                        if (playbackmodalopen == true) {
                            pauseVideos();
                            playbackmodalopen = false;
                        }
                    }
                });
            </script>

                    <script>
                        function updateCharCount() {
                            const count = $(".storymsg").val().length;
                            document.getElementById("charCount").textContent = `${count} / 50`;
                            if (count > 40) {
                                $("#charCount").removeClass("nodisplay");
                            } else {
                                $("#charCount").addClass("nodisplay");
                            }
                        }

                <!-- <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/js-cookie@3.0.5/dist/js.cookie.min.js"></script> -->
                <script>

                    // Global storage
                    var watched = JSON.parse(Cookies.get("watchedHighlights") || "[]");
                    var showingStories = false;
                    var globalPlaylist = {};
                    var currentPlaylistIndex = 0;
                    var currentProfileIndex = 0;
                    var playlistTimer = null;
                    var countdownInterval = null;
                    const PLAY_DURATION = 6000;
                    // 5 seconds as in your code

                    var str_uids = "";

                    $(".story_close_btn").click(function() {
                        $(".modal-highlights").hide();
                    });

                    // debug
                    // output info, doesnt change anything
                    function debug_playlistsorting(div="1") {

                        if (true)
                            return false;

                        // Ensure watched array exists
                        var watched = window.watched || [];

                        // Transform the playlist data
                        const transformedPlaylist = {};
                        for (const userId in globalPlaylist) {
                            if (globalPlaylist.hasOwnProperty(userId)) {
                                var entries = globalPlaylist[userId];
                                var username = entries[0]?.username;
                                if (username) {
                                    transformedPlaylist[username] = entries.map(item => `${item.mid}: ${watched.includes(item.mid) ? 1 : 0}`);
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        // Output the transformed data
                        $(".output_playlist" + div).html("<pre style='display:inline-block; width: 33%;'>" + div + " ::: " + JSON.stringify(transformedPlaylist, null, 2) + "</pre>");
                    }

                    function moveWatchedToEnd() {
                        devLogger("moveWatchedToEnd");

                        if (0 != 0)
                            return;
                        // no reordering on profile page

                        // Ensure watched array and globalPlaylist exist
                        const watched = new Set(window.watched || []);
                        if (!globalPlaylist || typeof globalPlaylist !== "object") {
                            devLogger("Error: Invalid globalPlaylist");
                            return;
                        }

                        // Separate users into watched and unwatched
                        const unwatchedUsers = {};
                        const watchedUsers = {};
                        for (const userId in globalPlaylist) {
                            if (globalPlaylist.hasOwnProperty(userId)) {
                                const entries = globalPlaylist[userId];
                                const allMids = entries.map(item => item.mid);
                                const allWatched = allMids.every(mid => watched.has(mid));
                                if (allWatched) {
                                    watchedUsers[userId] = entries;
                                } else {
                                    unwatchedUsers[userId] = entries;
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        // Rebuild globalPlaylist with unwatched users first, then watched users
                        globalPlaylist = {
                            ...unwatchedUsers,
                            ...watchedUsers
                        };

                        // Reorder DOM thumbnails to match globalPlaylist order
                        const $parent = $(".div-wrapper-stories-highlights");
                        if ($parent.length === 0) {
                            devLogger("Error: No .div-wrapper-stories-highlights container found");
                            return;
                        }

                        // Get all thumbnails, including .mystory
                        const $thumbnails = $(".highlight_single");
                        const $mystory = $thumbnails.filter(".mystory");
                        // Find .mystory thumbnail
                        const $otherThumbnails = $thumbnails.not(".mystory");
                        // Exclude .mystory for reordering

                        // Cache thumbnails by data-udir (excluding .mystory for main logic)
                        const thumbnailMap = new Map();
                        $otherThumbnails.each(function() {
                            const udir = $(this).attr("data-udir");
                            thumbnailMap.set(udir, $(this));
                        });

                        // Move .mystory to the first position if it exists
                        if ($mystory.length > 0) {
                            $parent.prepend($mystory);
                            // Place .mystory at the start
                            devLogger(".mystory moved to first position");
                        }

                        // Identify watched thumbnails to move
                        const orderedIds = Object.keys(globalPlaylist);
                        const currentOrder = $otherThumbnails.map( (i, el) => $(el).attr("data-udir")).get();
                        const toMove = [];
                        orderedIds.forEach( (userId, index) => {
                            const $thumbnail = thumbnailMap.get(userId);
                            if ($thumbnail && $thumbnail.hasClass("watched")) {
                                const currentIndex = currentOrder.indexOf(userId);
                                if (currentIndex !== index) {
                                    toMove.push(userId);
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        );

                        // Reorder all thumbnails (excluding .mystory), animating only watched ones
                        if (toMove.length > 0 || currentOrder.join() !== orderedIds.join()) {
                            const animations = toMove.map(userId => {
                                const $thumbnail = thumbnailMap.get(userId);
                                return new Promise(resolve => {
                                    if ($thumbnail) {
                                        $thumbnail.fadeOut(0, () => {
                                            const index = orderedIds.indexOf(userId);
                                            if (index === 0 && $mystory.length === 0) {
                                                // Only prepend if no .mystory
                                                $parent.prepend($thumbnail);
                                            } else {
                                                // Insert after .mystory (if present) or previous thumbnail
                                                const prevId = orderedIds[index - 1];
                                                const $prevThumbnail = thumbnailMap.get(prevId);
                                                if ($prevThumbnail) {
                                                    $thumbnail.insertAfter($prevThumbnail);
                                                } else if ($mystory.length > 0) {
                                                    $thumbnail.insertAfter($mystory);
                                                } else {
                                                    $parent.append($thumbnail);
                                                }
                                            }
                                            $thumbnail.fadeIn(0, resolve);
                                        }
                                        );
                                    } else {
                                        resolve();
                                    }
                                }
                                );
                            }
                            );

                            // Move unwatched thumbnails without animation
                            orderedIds.forEach( (userId, index) => {
                                if (!toMove.includes(userId)) {
                                    const $thumbnail = thumbnailMap.get(userId);
                                    if ($thumbnail) {
                                        if (index === 0 && $mystory.length === 0) {
                                            // Only prepend if no .mystory
                                            $parent.prepend($thumbnail);
                                        } else {
                                            // Insert after .mystory (if present) or previous thumbnail
                                            const prevId = orderedIds[index - 1];
                                            const $prevThumbnail = thumbnailMap.get(prevId);
                                            if ($prevThumbnail) {
                                                $thumbnail.insertAfter($prevThumbnail);
                                            } else if ($mystory.length > 0) {
                                                $thumbnail.insertAfter($mystory);
                                            } else {
                                                $parent.append($thumbnail);
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            );

                            // Wait for animations to complete
                            Promise.all(animations).then( () => {
                                devLogger("DOM thumbnails reordered:", JSON.stringify($(".highlight_single").map( (i, el) => $(el).attr("data-udir")).get()));
                            }
                            );
                        } else {
                            devLogger("No thumbnails need reordering");
                        }
                    }

                    function updateThumbnail(udir) {
                        devLogger("updateThumbnail:disabled");
                        return false;
                    }

                    // play a story
                    function ajax_showStory(currentProfile, mid) {
                        devLogger("ajax_showStory: " + currentProfile + " :: " + mid);
                        $("body").addClass("storyVisible");
                        $(".modal-highlights .modal-inner.single iframe").hide();
                        $(".modal-highlights .modal-inner.single .highlight").hide();
                        $(".modal-highlights .modal-inner.single .highlight" + mid).show();

                        $(".modal-highlights .modal-inner.single iframe#stream_mid" + mid).attr("src", function() {
                            return $(this).attr("data-src");
                        }).show();

                        // Mark current mid as watched
                        watched = JSON.parse(Cookies.get("watchedHighlights") || "[]");
                        if (!watched.includes(mid)) {
                            devLogger(`Watched mid ${mid} for profile ${currentProfile}`);
                            watched.push(mid);
                            Cookies.set("watchedHighlights", JSON.stringify(watched), {
                                expires: 30
                            });

                            // Update watched status in globalPlaylist
                            const playlist = globalPlaylist[currentProfile];
                            if (playlist && Array.isArray(playlist)) {
                                const item = playlist.find(item => item.mid === mid);
                                if (item) {
                                    item.watched = 1;
                                    // devLogger(`Set watched=1 for mid ${mid} in globalPlaylist`);
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        // Update thumbnail for currentProfile
                        if (0 == 0)
                            updateThumbnail(currentProfile);
                        if (0 > 0)
                            $(`.highlight_single.otherstory.highlight_single` + mid).addClass("watched");
                        // on profile

                    }

                    function updateButtonVisibility(profileKeys) {
                        if (currentProfileIndex === 0 && currentPlaylistIndex === 0) {
                            $(".playlist-prev").hide();
                        } else {
                            $(".playlist-prev").show();
                        }

                        if (currentProfileIndex === profileKeys.length - 1 && currentPlaylistIndex === globalPlaylist[profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]].length - 1) {
                            $(".playlist-next").hide();
                        } else {
                            $(".playlist-next").show();
                        }
                    }

                    function story_addView(mid, uid) {
                        $.ajax({
                            type: "GET",
                            url: "/ajax.php?story_addView&mid=" + mid + "&uid=" + uid,
                            success: function() {}
                        });
                    }

                    let player = null;
                    // For videos, store player reference

                    function startCountdown(duration, photo_video, mid, profileKeys, uid) {
                        console.log({
                            duration,
                            photo_video,
                            mid,
                            profileKeys
                        });
                        devLogger("startCountdown: " + mid + ", photo_video: " + photo_video + ", duration: " + duration);

                        if (countdownInterval) {
                            devLogger("startCountdown countdownInterval");
                            clearInterval(countdownInterval);
                        }

                        const timerBar = $(".playlist-timer-bar");
                        let progressBar = $(".timer-progress");
                        let progressContainer = $(".progress-container");

                        // Ensure progress-container exists
                        if (!progressContainer.length) {
                            progressBar.wrap('<div class="progress-container"></div>');
                            progressContainer = $(".progress-container");
                            progressBar = $(".timer-progress");
                            // Re-select after wrapping
                        }

                        progressBar.css("width", "0%");
                        // Reset width

                        // Update timer bar with divs for playlist progress
                        const udir = profileKeys[currentProfileIndex];
                        const playlist = globalPlaylist[udir];
                        if (playlist && Array.isArray(playlist)) {
                            const totalStories = playlist.length;
                            const currentPosition = currentPlaylistIndex + 1;
                            // 1-based index

                            // Clear existing divs except progress-container
                            timerBar.children().not(".progress-container").remove();

                            // Calculate equal width for all divs
                            const barWidth = 100 / totalStories + "%";

                            // Prepend fully white divs for previous stories
                            for (let i = 0; i < currentPosition - 1; i++) {
                                $("<div>").addClass("fully-white").css("width", barWidth).prependTo(timerBar);
                            }

                            // Append empty divs for upcoming stories
                            for (let i = 0; i < totalStories - currentPosition; i++) {
                                $("<div>").addClass("empty-bar").css("width", barWidth).appendTo(timerBar);
                            }

                            // Set progress-container width
                            progressContainer.css("width", barWidth);

                            devLogger(`Timer bar updated: ${currentPosition - 1} fully-white, 1 progress-container, ${totalStories - currentPosition} empty for udir ${udir}`);
                        } else {
                            devLogger(`No valid playlist for udir ${udir} in startCountdown`);
                            // Clear extra divs, keep progress-container
                            timerBar.children().not(".progress-container").remove();
                            progressContainer.css("width", "100%");
                            // Full width if no playlist
                        }

                        let hasViewed = false;
                        // Flag to ensure story_addView is called only once
                        let isPaused = false;
                        // Track pause state
                        let timeLeft = duration;
                        // For photos, track remaining time

                        // Function to pause playback
                        function pausePlayback() {
                            if (isPaused)
                                return;
                            devLogger("Pausing playback for mid: " + mid);
                            isPaused = true;

                            if (photo_video == 2 && player) {
                                player.pause();
                            } else if (photo_video == 1 && countdownInterval) {
                                clearInterval(countdownInterval);
                            }
                        }

                        // Function to resume playback
                        function resumePlayback() {
                            if (!isPaused)
                                return;
                            devLogger("Resuming playback for mid: " + mid);
                            isPaused = false;

                            if (photo_video == 2 && player) {
                                player.play().catch(error => {
                                    devLogger("Video resume failed: " + error);
                                }
                                );
                            } else if (photo_video == 1) {
                                countdownInterval = setInterval( () => {
                                    timeLeft -= 20;
                                    const elapsedTime = duration - timeLeft;
                                    // Time progressed in ms
                                    const percentage = ((duration - timeLeft) / duration) * 100;
                                    progressBar.css("width", percentage + "%");

                                    // Call story_addView after 0.1 second of progress
                                    if (elapsedTime >= 100 && !hasViewed) {
                                        hasViewed = true;
                                        story_addView(mid);
                                        devLogger("A: story_addView called for mid: " + mid);
                                    }

                                    if (timeLeft <= 0) {
                                        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
                                        navigateNext(profileKeys);
                                    }
                                }
                                , 20);
                            }
                        }

                        // Event listeners for input focus/blur
                        const chatInput = $(".highlight-chat input.msg");

                        function addInputListeners() {
                            chatInput.off("focus.countdown blur.countdown input.countdown");
                            chatInput.on("focus.countdown", pausePlayback);
                            chatInput.on("blur.countdown", function() {
                                if (chatInput.val().length === 0 && !$(".modal-payment-wrapper-tip").is(":visible")) {
                                    resumePlayback();
                                }
                            });

                            $(document).off("click.tipOpen").on("click.tipOpen", ".interact_tip", () => {
                                pausePlayback();
                            }
                            );

                            chatInput.on("input.countdown", function() {
                                if (chatInput.val().length > 0) {
                                    pausePlayback();
                                }
                            });
                        }

                        // Event listeners for touch events
                        function addTouchListeners() {
                            $(document).off("touchstart.countdown touchend.countdown");
                            $(document).on("touchstart.countdown", pausePlayback);
                            $(document).on("touchend.countdown", resumePlayback);
                        }

                        // Initialize listeners
                        addInputListeners();
                        addTouchListeners();

                        if (photo_video == 2) {
                            devLogger("photo_video:" + photo_video + " , #stream_mid" + mid);

                            if (player != null)
                                player.pause();

                            player = window["player" + mid];

                            if (!player) {
                                devLogger("Player not found for mid: " + mid);
                                const iframe = document.querySelector(`#stream_mid${mid}`);
                                if (iframe && iframe.contentWindow && iframe.contentWindow.Stream) {
                                    window["player" + mid] = iframe.contentWindow.Stream(iframe);
                                    player = window["player" + mid];
                                    devLogger("Initialized player as fallback");
                                } else {
                                    devLogger("Cannot initialize player - Stream not available");
                                    return;
                                }
                            }

                            window.currentPlayer = player;

                            // Remove existing listeners
                            if (player._timeUpdateListener) {
                                player.removeEventListener("timeupdate", player._timeUpdateListener);
                            }

                            player._hasEnded = false;

                            // Timeupdate handler for progress bar
                            function updateProgress() {
                                if (isPaused)
                                    return;
                                const currentTime = player.currentTime;
                                const totalDuration = player.duration;
                                const percentage = (currentTime / totalDuration) * 100;
                                progressBar.css("width", percentage + "%");

                                // Call story_addView after 1 second
                                if (currentTime >= 0.1 && !hasViewed) {
                                    hasViewed = true;
                                    story_addView(mid);
                                    devLogger("B: story_addView called for mid: " + mid);
                                }

                                // Trigger navigation when 0.5 seconds remain
                                if (totalDuration - currentTime <= 0.5 && !player._hasEnded && totalDuration > 0) {
                                    player._hasEnded = true;
                                    player.pause();
                                    devLogger("Triggering next video - 0.5s remaining");
                                    navigateNext(profileKeys);
                                }
                            }

                            player.addEventListener("timeupdate", updateProgress);
                            player._timeUpdateListener = updateProgress;

                            player.play().catch(error => {
                                devLogger("Video play failed: " + error);
                            }
                            );
                        } else {
                            countdownInterval = setInterval( () => {
                                if (isPaused)
                                    return;
                                timeLeft -= 20;
                                const elapsedTime = duration - timeLeft;
                                const percentage = ((duration - timeLeft) / duration) * 100;
                                progressBar.css("width", percentage + "%");

                                // 0.1 sec
                                if (elapsedTime >= 100 && !hasViewed) {
                                    hasViewed = true;
                                    story_addView(mid, uid);
                                    devLogger("story_addView called for mid: " + mid + ", uid: " + uid);
                                }

                                if (timeLeft <= 0) {
                                    clearInterval(countdownInterval);
                                    navigateNext(profileKeys);
                                }
                            }
                            , 20);
                        }

                        // Cleanup listeners when countdown ends
                        function cleanupListeners() {
                            chatInput.off("focus.countdown blur.countdown");
                            $(document).off("touchstart.countdown touchend.countdown");
                            if (photo_video == 2 && player && player._timeUpdateListener) {
                                player.removeEventListener("timeupdate", player._timeUpdateListener);
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    function navigateNext(profileKeys, swipe=false) {
                        devLogger("navigateNext");

                        // Ensure profileKeys is current
                        profileKeys = Object.keys(globalPlaylist);

                        if (playlistTimer)
                            clearTimeout(playlistTimer);
                        if (countdownInterval)
                            clearInterval(countdownInterval);

                        // Clean up previous player listeners
                        if (window.currentPlayer) {
                            if (window.currentPlayer._timeUpdateListener) {
                                window.currentPlayer.removeEventListener("timeupdate", window.currentPlayer._timeUpdateListener);
                                delete window.currentPlayer._timeUpdateListener;
                            }
                            if (window.currentPlayer._endedListener) {
                                window.currentPlayer.removeEventListener("ended", window.currentPlayer._endedListener);
                                delete window.currentPlayer._endedListener;
                            }
                            devLogger("Cleaned up previous player listeners");
                        }

                        if (swipe) {
                            // For swipe, move to the next udir
                            currentProfileIndex++;
                            currentPlaylistIndex = 0;
                            // Start at the first item of the new udir
                        } else {
                            // Original button press logic
                            currentPlaylistIndex++;
                            if (currentPlaylistIndex >= globalPlaylist[profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]]?.length) {
                                currentProfileIndex++;
                                currentPlaylistIndex = 0;
                            }
                        }

                        // Validate indices
                        if (!profileKeys || currentProfileIndex >= profileKeys.length || currentProfileIndex < 0) {
                            devLogger(`navigateNext: Invalid state - profileKeys: ${JSON.stringify(profileKeys)}, currentProfileIndex: ${currentProfileIndex}`);
                            storiesHidden();
                            return;
                        }

                        if (!globalPlaylist[profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]]) {
                            devLogger(`navigateNext: No playlist for udir ${profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]}`);
                            storiesHidden();
                            return;
                        }

                        playCurrentItem(profileKeys);
                        // Use robust version
                    }

                    function navigatePrev(profileKeys) {
                        devLogger("navigatePrev");

                        // Ensure profileKeys is current
                        profileKeys = Object.keys(globalPlaylist);

                        if (playlistTimer)
                            clearTimeout(playlistTimer);
                        if (countdownInterval)
                            clearInterval(countdownInterval);

                        // Clean up previous player listeners
                        if (window.currentPlayer) {
                            if (window.currentPlayer._timeUpdateListener) {
                                window.currentPlayer.removeEventListener("timeupdate", window.currentPlayer._timeUpdateListener);
                                delete window.currentPlayer._timeUpdateListener;
                            }
                            if (window.currentPlayer._endedListener) {
                                window.currentPlayer.removeEventListener("ended", window.currentPlayer._endedListener);
                                delete window.currentPlayer._endedListener;
                            }
                            devLogger("Cleaned up previous player listeners");
                        }

                        currentPlaylistIndex--;
                        if (currentPlaylistIndex < 0) {
                            currentProfileIndex--;
                            if (currentProfileIndex < 0) {
                                currentProfileIndex = 0;
                                currentPlaylistIndex = 0;
                                devLogger("navigatePrev: At first item, staying at start");
                                return;
                                // No navigation needed
                            } else {
                                if (!globalPlaylist[profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]]) {
                                    devLogger(`navigatePrev: No playlist for udir ${profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]}`);
                                    storiesHidden();
                                    return;
                                }
                                currentPlaylistIndex = globalPlaylist[profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]].length - 1;
                            }
                        }

                        // Validate indices
                        if (!profileKeys || currentProfileIndex >= profileKeys.length || currentProfileIndex < 0) {
                            devLogger(`navigatePrev: Invalid state - profileKeys: ${JSON.stringify(profileKeys)}, currentProfileIndex: ${currentProfileIndex}`);
                            storiesHidden();
                            return;
                        }

                        if (!globalPlaylist[profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]]) {
                            devLogger(`navigatePrev: No playlist for udir ${profileKeys[currentProfileIndex]}`);
                            storiesHidden();
                            return;
                        }

                        playCurrentItem(profileKeys);
                        // Use robust version
                    }

                    function playCurrentItem(profileKeys, mid=null) {
                        devLogger("playCurrentItem");
                        if (showingStories !== true)
                            return;

                        resetStoryChat();

                        if (playlistTimer) {
                            devLogger("clearTimeout...playlistTimer");
                            clearTimeout(playlistTimer);
                        }

                        let currentProfile, currentItem;

                        if (mid !== null) {
                            // Find udir and item for the given mid
                            let found = false;
                            for (const udir of profileKeys) {
                                const playlist = globalPlaylist[udir];
                                if (playlist && Array.isArray(playlist)) {
                                    const itemIndex = playlist.findIndex(item => item.mid == mid);
                                    if (itemIndex !== -1) {
                                        currentProfile = udir;
                                        currentPlaylistIndex = itemIndex;
                                        currentProfileIndex = profileKeys.indexOf(udir);
                                        currentItem = playlist[itemIndex];
                                        found = true;
                                        break;
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                            if (!found) {
                                devLogger(`playCurrentItem: No item found for mid ${mid}`);
                                storiesHidden();
                                return;
                            }
                        } else {
                            // Existing logic for next unwatched media
                            currentProfile = profileKeys[currentProfileIndex];
                            const currentPlaylist = globalPlaylist[currentProfile];

                            if (!currentPlaylist || !Array.isArray(currentPlaylist) || currentPlaylist.length === 0) {
                                devLogger(`playCurrentItem: Invalid playlist for udir ${currentProfile}`);
                                storiesHidden();
                                return;
                            }

                            if (currentPlaylistIndex >= currentPlaylist.length || currentPlaylistIndex < 0) {
                                devLogger(`playCurrentItem: Invalid index ${currentPlaylistIndex} for udir ${currentProfile}`);
                                storiesHidden();
                                return;
                            }

                            currentItem = currentPlaylist[currentPlaylistIndex];
                        }

                        const itemMid = currentItem.mid;
                        const itemUid = currentItem.uid;
                        const isVideo = currentItem.photo_video === "2";
                        const duration = (currentItem.duration || 6) * 1000;

                        devLogger("photo_video: " + currentItem.photo_video);

                        ajax_showStory(currentProfile, itemMid);
                        updateButtonVisibility(profileKeys);

                        setTimeout( () => {
                            startCountdown(duration, currentItem.photo_video, itemMid, profileKeys, itemUid);
                        }
                        , 100);

                        $(".tipmsgmid").val(itemMid);
                        $(".tipmsgudir").val(currentProfile);
                        $(".modal-payment-wrapper-tip .tiptitleuser").html("Tip " + globalPlaylist[currentProfile][0].username);
                    }

                    // Swipe detection
                    function initSwipeNavigation(profileKeys) {
                        if (!profileKeys || profileKeys.length === 0) {
                            devLogger("initSwipeNavigation: No profileKeys available, skipping initialization");
                            return;
                        }

                        devLogger("initSwipeNavigation");
                        const container = document.querySelector(".modal-highlights .modal-inner");
                        if (!container) {
                            devLogger("initSwipeNavigation: Container .modal-highlights .modal-inner not found");
                            return;
                        }

                        let touchStartX = 0;
                        let touchEndX = 0;

                        container.addEventListener("touchstart", (e) => {
                            touchStartX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
                            // devLogger(`touchstart: ${touchStartX}`);
                        }
                        );

                        container.addEventListener("touchend", (e) => {
                            touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].screenX;
                            // devLogger(`touchend: ${touchEndX}`);
                            handleSwipe(touchStartX, touchEndX, profileKeys);
                        }
                        );
                    }

                    function handleSwipe(startX, endX, profileKeys) {
                        // devLogger("handleSwipe");
                        const swipeThreshold = 50;
                        // Minimum distance for a swipe
                        const deltaX = endX - startX;

                        if (Math.abs(deltaX) > swipeThreshold) {
                            if (deltaX < 0) {
                                // Left swipe: go to next udir
                                if (currentProfileIndex < profileKeys.length - 1) {
                                    devLogger(`Left swipe: Navigating to next udir, currentProfileIndex: ${currentProfileIndex}`);
                                    navigateNext(profileKeys, true);
                                } else {
                                    devLogger("Left swipe: At last udir, no navigation");
                                }
                            } else {
                                // Right swipe: go to previous udir
                                if (currentProfileIndex > 0) {
                                    devLogger(`Right swipe: Navigating to previous udir, currentProfileIndex: ${currentProfileIndex}`);
                                    currentProfileIndex--;
                                    currentPlaylistIndex = 0;
                                    playCurrentItem(profileKeys);
                                } else {
                                    devLogger("Right swipe: At first udir, no navigation");
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    // Initialize swipe navigation after stories are loaded
                    function setupSwipeNavigation() {
                        const profileKeys = Object.keys(globalPlaylist);
                        initSwipeNavigation(profileKeys);
                    }

                    function setupButtonListeners(profileKeys) {
                        $(".playlist-next").off().click(function() {
                            navigateNext(profileKeys);
                        });

                        $(".playlist-prev").off().click(function() {
                            navigatePrev(profileKeys);
                        });
                    }

                    function lazy_unloadStories() {
                        devLogger("Unloading stories...");
                        $(".modal-highlights .modal-inner.single iframe").each(function() {
                            const $iframe = $(this);
                            const mid = $iframe.attr("id").replace("stream_mid", "");
                            // Extract mid from id
                            const player = window["player" + mid];

                            // Stop and clean up the player if it exists
                            if (player) {
                                devLogger("Stopping player for mid: " + mid);
                                player.pause();
                                // Pause playback
                                if (player._timeUpdateListener) {
                                    player.removeEventListener("timeupdate", player._timeUpdateListener);
                                    delete player._timeUpdateListener;
                                }
                                if (player._endedListener) {
                                    player.removeEventListener("ended", player._endedListener);
                                    delete player._endedListener;
                                }
                                delete window["player" + mid];
                                // Remove from global scope
                            }

                            $iframe.removeAttr("src").hide();
                            // Now safe to unload
                        });

                        // Clear currentPlayer reference
                        if (window.currentPlayer) {
                            delete window.currentPlayer;
                        }
                    }

                    function storiesHidden() {
                        showingStories = false;
                        $(".modal-highlights").hide();
                        devLogger("hidden story");
                        $("body").removeClass("storyVisible");
                        lazy_unloadStories();

                        $(".tipmsgmid").val("");
                        $(".tipmsgudir").val("");

                        devLogger("clearTimeout playlistTimer...");
                        if (playlistTimer)
                            clearTimeout(playlistTimer);
                        playlistTimer = null;

                        if (countdownInterval) {
                            clearInterval(countdownInterval);
                            countdownInterval = null;
                        }

                        // Check all profiles for watched status
                        let anyWatched = false;
                        const profileKeys = Object.keys(globalPlaylist);
                        for (const profile of profileKeys) {
                            const playlist = globalPlaylist[profile];
                            if (playlist && Array.isArray(playlist)) {
                                const allMids = playlist.map(item => item.mid);
                                const allWatched = allMids.every(mid => watched.includes(mid));
                                if (allWatched) {
                                    $(`.highlight_single.otherstory.story_${profile}`).addClass("watched");
                                    // devLogger(`All mids watched for profile ${profile}`);
                                    anyWatched = true;
                                }
                            } else {
                                devLogger(`No valid playlist for profile ${profile}`);
                            }
                        }

                        // Reorder if any profiles are fully watched
                        if (anyWatched) {
                            moveWatchedToEnd();
                        }

                        debug_playlistsorting(3);
                        // Debug after closing stories
                    }

                    const $modal = $(".modal-highlights");

                    const observerStory = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
                        mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
                            if (mutation.attributeName === "style") {
                                if ($modal.css("display") === "none") {
                                    storiesHidden();
                                }
                            }
                        });
                    }
                    );

                    observerStory.observe($modal[0], {
                        attributes: true,
                        attributeFilter: ["style"]
                    });

                    function story_playStoryFromPlaylist(udir, input_mid=null) {

                        devLogger("story_playStoryFromPlaylist", {
                            udir,
                            input_mid
                        });
                        showingStories = true;

                        // Show modal
                        $(".modal-highlights").show();

                        const profileKeys = Object.keys(globalPlaylist || {});
                        currentProfileIndex = profileKeys.indexOf(udir);
                        if (currentProfileIndex === -1) {
                            devLogger("udir not found, defaulting to first profile");
                            currentProfileIndex = 0;
                            if (profileKeys.length === 0) {
                                devLogger("No playlists available");
                                alert("No stories available");
                                $(".modal-highlights").hide();
                                return;
                            }
                        }

                        // Ensure the udir exists in globalPlaylist
                        if (!globalPlaylist[udir] || !Array.isArray(globalPlaylist[udir])) {
                            devLogger(`No playlist found for udir ${udir}`);
                            alert("No stories found");
                            $(".modal-highlights").hide();
                            return;
                        }

                        // Set currentPlaylistIndex to the first unwatched item
                        const playlist = globalPlaylist[udir];
                        currentPlaylistIndex = 0;
                        for (let i = 0; i < playlist.length; i++) {
                            if (!playlist[i].watched) {
                                currentPlaylistIndex = i;
                                break;
                            }
                        }

                        // If input_mid is provided, verify it exists (for logging/error handling)
                        if (input_mid !== null) {
                            const midIndex = playlist.findIndex(item => item.mid === input_mid);
                            if (midIndex === -1) {
                                devLogger(`input_mid ${input_mid} not found in ${udir}`);
                                alert("Not found story");
                                $(".modal-highlights").hide();
                                return;
                            }
                            devLogger(`Clicked input_mid ${input_mid}, but starting at first unwatched index ${currentPlaylistIndex}`);
                        }

                        devLogger(`Starting playback: profileIndex=${currentProfileIndex}, playlistIndex=${currentPlaylistIndex}`);
                        playCurrentItem(profileKeys, input_mid);
                    }

                    function story_setClickLinks() {
                        // thumbnails

                        devLogger("story_setClickLinks");

                        $(".div-wrapper-stories-highlights .highlight_single.otherstory").off().click(function() {
                            var temp_udir = $(this).attr("data-udir");
                            var temp_sid = parseInt($(this).attr("data-sid"));
                            if (0 == 0) {
                                story_playStoryFromPlaylist(temp_udir);
                                // otherstory
                            } else {
                                story_playStoryFromPlaylist(temp_udir, temp_sid);
                                // otherstory
                            }
                        });

                        $(".container-member-v3").addClass("hasStory");

                        $(".container-member-v3 .theprofilepic").on("click", function() {
                            const profileKeys = Object.keys(globalPlaylist || {});
                            const currentProfile = profileKeys[currentProfileIndex];
                            story_playStoryFromPlaylist(currentProfile);
                        });

                    }

                    function resetStoryChat() {
                        $(".storymsg").val("");
                        $(".highlight-chat .far.fa-heart").removeClass("nodisplay");
                        $(".highlight-chat .fas.fa-heart").addClass("nodisplay");
                    }
                </script>

                    $(".highlight-chat .far.fa-heart").on("click", function() {
                        getLoginModal();
                    });

                    $(".storysendbtn").on("click", function() {
                        getLoginModal();
                    });
                </script>

                        }]
                    },
                    "myStory": false
                };

                if (arr.result == 0) {
                    devLogger("no stories found");
                }

                if (arr.result == 1) {

                    $(".div-wrapper-stories-highlights").css("opacity", 1);

                    $(".modal-highlights .modal-inner.single").append(arr.html);
                    $(".modal-highlights .modal-inner.single iframe").hide();

                    // Initialize globalPlaylist and update watched status
                    globalPlaylist = arr.playlist;

                    debug_playlistsorting(1);
                    // debug :: before sorting

                    // initialise watched
                    watched = JSON.parse(Cookies.get("watchedHighlights") || "[]");
                    for (const udir in globalPlaylist) {
                        const playlist = globalPlaylist[udir];
                        if (playlist && Array.isArray(playlist)) {
                            playlist.forEach(item => {
                                if (watched.includes(item.mid)) {
                                    item.watched = 1;
                                    // devLogger(`Set watched=1 for mid ${item.mid} in udir ${udir} during initialization`);
                                }
                            }
                            );
                            // Update thumbnail for this udir
                            if (0 == 0)
                                updateThumbnail(udir);
                        }
                    }

                    storiesHidden();

                    debug_playlistsorting(2);
                    // debug :: after initial sorting	

                    // Add timer bar and navigation buttons
                    setupSwipeNavigation();
                    setupButtonListeners(Object.keys(globalPlaylist));

                    // thumbnail action
                    story_setClickLinks();

                    $(document).ready(function() {
                        initLazyLoadForNewImages();
                    });

                }

                if (arr.myStory != false) {
                    $(".div-wrapper-stories-highlights .mystory .highlight_thumb").attr("data-sid", arr.myStory);
                    $(".div-wrapper-stories-highlights .mystory").removeClass("noborder");
                } else {
                    $(".div-wrapper-stories-highlights .mystory .highlight_thumb").attr("data-sid", "");
                    $(".div-wrapper-stories-highlights .mystory").addClass("noborder");
                }
            </script>

                            <script>
                                function changeView(type) {

                                    $(".filtertop").removeClass("selected");
                                    $(".filter" + type).addClass("selected");

                                    // reset
                                    $(".subtypesmenu").removeClass("popular");
                                    $(".subtypesmenu").removeClass("gender");
                                    $(".subtypesmenu").removeClass("more");

                                    // set
                                    $(".subtypesmenu").addClass(type);

                                }

                                $(document).ready(function() {

                                    $(".filterpopular").click(function() {
                                        changeView("popular");
                                    });
                                    $(".filtergender").click(function() {
                                        changeView("gender");
                                    });
                                    $(".filtermore").click(function() {
                                        changeView("more");
                                    });

                                });
                            </script>
