                            <script>
                                function showBookingForm(u, p, product, mindur, pmp, pmv, expl) {

                                    $(".bookingrequestform").show();
                                    $(".bookingrequestsuccess").hide();
                                    $(".booking_model").val(u);
                                    $(".booking_model_img").attr("href", "https://revealme.com/" + u);
                                    $(".booking_model_img img").attr("src", p);
                                    $(".booking_model_title").html(u);

                                    // -----
                                    $(".type_phone").prop("disabled", false);
                                    $(".type_phone").show();
                                    $(".type_video").prop("disabled", false);
                                    $(".type_video").show();

                                    if (pmp == false) {
                                        $(".type_phone").prop("disabled", true);
                                        $(".type_phone").hide();
                                        $(".pmp").val(0);
                                    } else {
                                        $(".pmp").val(pmp);
                                    }
                                    if (pmv == false) {
                                        $(".type_video").prop("disabled", true);
                                        $(".type_video").hide();
                                        $(".pmv").val(0);
                                    } else {
                                        $(".pmv").val(pmv);
                                    }

                                    // -----
                                    $(".platform_select").prop("disabled", false);
                                    $(".platform_select").show();

                                    if (expl.length > 0) {
                                        var subarr = expl.split(",");

                                        //devLogger("expl:"+expl);
                                        //devLogger("subarr:"+subarr);

                                        var i;
                                        for (i = 0; i < subarr.length; ++i) {
                                            // do something with subarr[i]
                                            $(".platform_" + subarr[i]).prop("disabled", true);
                                            $(".platform_" + subarr[i]).hide();
                                        }
                                    }

                                    // ---- set first visible booking platform
                                    var firstVisibleValue = "";
                                    $(".input_booking_app").children().each(function() {
                                        //iterate options

                                        //check if option is visible
                                        if ($(this).css("display") != "none") {
                                            firstVisibleValue = $(this).val();
                                            return false;
                                            //stop iterating
                                        }
                                    });
                                    $(".input_booking_app").val(firstVisibleValue);

                                    // -----
                                    $(".chooseduration option").prop("disabled", false);
                                    $(".chooseduration option").show();

                                    if (mindur == 5)
                                        $(".chooseduration").val(5).change();

                                    if (mindur > 5) {
                                        var isset1 = false;
                                        $(".chooseduration > option").each(function() {
                                            if (mindur > $(this).val()) {
                                                $(this).prop("disabled", true);
                                                $(this).hide();
                                            } else {
                                                if (!isset1) {
                                                    $(".chooseduration").val($(this).val()).change();
                                                    isset1 = true;
                                                }
                                            }
                                        });
                                    }

                                    // -----
                                    $(".modal-booking-wrapper").show();
                                    $(".booking_type").val(product);

                                    total = 0;
                                    if (product == "video")
                                        total = mindur * pmv;
                                    if (product == "phone")
                                        total = mindur * pmp;

                                    $(".modal-booking-amount").html(total + " Gems");
                                }
                            </script>
                            <script>
                                function showBookingTopup() {
                                    $(".modal-booking-wrapper").show();
                                }

                                $(document).ready(function() {
                                    $(".modal-booking-wrapper .submitbookingReq").off("click").removeAttr("onclick");
                                    $(".modal-booking-wrapper .submitbookingReq").click(function() {
                                        getLoginModal();
                                    });
                                });
                            </script>
                            <script>

                                function checkRequireFieldsBookingRequest() {

                                    var complete = true;

                                    $(".modal-booking-wrapper input:required").each(function() {
                                        if ($(this).val() === "") {
                                            complete = false;
                                        }
                                    });

                                    if (complete == false) {
                                        alert("Please complete the required fields");
                                        return false;
                                    } else {
                                        return true;
                                    }
                                }

                                function updateBookingValue() {

                                    var booking_type = $(".booking_type").val();
                                    var pm;
                                    var duration = $(".chooseduration").val();

                                    if (booking_type == "phone")
                                        pm = $(".pmp").val();
                                    if (booking_type == "video")
                                        pm = $(".pmv").val();

                                    var newval = duration * pm;

                                    //devLogger("duration: "+duration);
                                    //devLogger("pm: "+pm);
                                    //devLogger("newval: "+newval);

                                    $(".modal-booking-amount").html(newval + " Gems");
                                }
                            </script>
                            <script>
                                $(document).ready(function() {
                                    $(".chooseduration").change(function() {
                                        updateBookingValue();
                                    });
                                    $(".booking_type").change(function() {
                                        updateBookingValue();
                                    });

                                    $(".input_booking_app").change(function() {
                                        if ($(this).val() == "livecam") {
                                            $(".booking_inner.mycontact").addClass("nodisplay");
                                        } else {
                                            $(".booking_inner.mycontact").removeClass("nodisplay");
                                        }
                                    });

                                });
                            </script>
                            <div class="modal-wrapper-outer modal-booking-topup-wrapper">

<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        function startRandomVibration() {
            $(".lovense_icon").each(function() {
                var icon = $(this);

                function vibrateIcon() {
                    var delay = Math.random() * 2000 + 1000;
                    // Random delay between 

                    setTimeout(function() {
                        icon.addClass("vibrating");
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            icon.removeClass("vibrating");
                            vibrateIcon();
                            // Schedule the next vibration
                        }, 1000);
                        // Keep vibrating for 1 second
                    }, delay);
                }

                vibrateIcon();
                // Start the first vibration
            });
        }

        startRandomVibration();
    });
</script>
<script>
    function toggleHotlist(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var $card = $icon.closest(".profile-single");
        var isActive = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var hotlistVal = isActive ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = remove, 0 = add

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isActive) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint with hotlist parameter
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                hotlist: hotlistVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function() {
                if (window.location.pathname.indexOf("/hotlist") !== -1) {
                    var $hotlistedSection = $("#hotlistedModelsGrid");
                    var $followedSection = $("#followedModelsGrid");
                    var $emptyState = $("#hotlistEmpty");

                    if (isActive) {
                        if ($followedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $followedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $hotlistedSection.find(".profile-single").length === 0) {
                            if ($emptyState.length) {
                                $emptyState.show();
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $hotlistedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($emptyState.length) {
                            $emptyState.hide();
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isActive) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }

    function toggleFollow(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var isFollowing = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var followVal = isFollowing ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = unfollow, 0 = follow

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isFollowing) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
            $icon.text("+");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
            $icon.text("⭐");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                follow: followVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function(response) {
                // On successful follow, refresh page to move card to "Models You Follow"
                if (!isFollowing) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isFollowing) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                    $icon.text("⭐");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                    $icon.text("+");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        function startRandomVibration() {
            $(".lovense_icon").each(function() {
                var icon = $(this);

                function vibrateIcon() {
                    var delay = Math.random() * 2000 + 1000;
                    // Random delay between 

                    setTimeout(function() {
                        icon.addClass("vibrating");
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            icon.removeClass("vibrating");
                            vibrateIcon();
                            // Schedule the next vibration
                        }, 1000);
                        // Keep vibrating for 1 second
                    }, delay);
                }

                vibrateIcon();
                // Start the first vibration
            });
        }

        startRandomVibration();
    });
</script>
<script>
    function toggleHotlist(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var $card = $icon.closest(".profile-single");
        var isActive = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var hotlistVal = isActive ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = remove, 0 = add

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isActive) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint with hotlist parameter
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                hotlist: hotlistVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function() {
                if (window.location.pathname.indexOf("/hotlist") !== -1) {
                    var $hotlistedSection = $("#hotlistedModelsGrid");
                    var $followedSection = $("#followedModelsGrid");
                    var $emptyState = $("#hotlistEmpty");

                    if (isActive) {
                        if ($followedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $followedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $hotlistedSection.find(".profile-single").length === 0) {
                            if ($emptyState.length) {
                                $emptyState.show();
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $hotlistedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($emptyState.length) {
                            $emptyState.hide();
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isActive) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }

    function toggleFollow(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var isFollowing = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var followVal = isFollowing ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = unfollow, 0 = follow

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isFollowing) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
            $icon.text("+");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
            $icon.text("⭐");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                follow: followVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function(response) {
                // On successful follow, refresh page to move card to "Models You Follow"
                if (!isFollowing) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isFollowing) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                    $icon.text("⭐");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                    $icon.text("+");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        function startRandomVibration() {
            $(".lovense_icon").each(function() {
                var icon = $(this);

                function vibrateIcon() {
                    var delay = Math.random() * 2000 + 1000;
                    // Random delay between 

                    setTimeout(function() {
                        icon.addClass("vibrating");
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            icon.removeClass("vibrating");
                            vibrateIcon();
                            // Schedule the next vibration
                        }, 1000);
                        // Keep vibrating for 1 second
                    }, delay);
                }

                vibrateIcon();
                // Start the first vibration
            });
        }

        startRandomVibration();
    });
</script>
<script>
    function toggleHotlist(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var $card = $icon.closest(".profile-single");
        var isActive = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var hotlistVal = isActive ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = remove, 0 = add

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isActive) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint with hotlist parameter
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                hotlist: hotlistVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function() {
                if (window.location.pathname.indexOf("/hotlist") !== -1) {
                    var $hotlistedSection = $("#hotlistedModelsGrid");
                    var $followedSection = $("#followedModelsGrid");
                    var $emptyState = $("#hotlistEmpty");

                    if (isActive) {
                        if ($followedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $followedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $hotlistedSection.find(".profile-single").length === 0) {
                            if ($emptyState.length) {
                                $emptyState.show();
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $hotlistedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($emptyState.length) {
                            $emptyState.hide();
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isActive) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }

    function toggleFollow(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var isFollowing = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var followVal = isFollowing ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = unfollow, 0 = follow

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isFollowing) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
            $icon.text("+");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
            $icon.text("⭐");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                follow: followVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function(response) {
                // On successful follow, refresh page to move card to "Models You Follow"
                if (!isFollowing) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isFollowing) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                    $icon.text("⭐");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                    $icon.text("+");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        function startRandomVibration() {
            $(".lovense_icon").each(function() {
                var icon = $(this);

                function vibrateIcon() {
                    var delay = Math.random() * 2000 + 1000;
                    // Random delay between 

                    setTimeout(function() {
                        icon.addClass("vibrating");
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            icon.removeClass("vibrating");
                            vibrateIcon();
                            // Schedule the next vibration
                        }, 1000);
                        // Keep vibrating for 1 second
                    }, delay);
                }

                vibrateIcon();
                // Start the first vibration
            });
        }

        startRandomVibration();
    });
</script>
<script>
    function toggleHotlist(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var $card = $icon.closest(".profile-single");
        var isActive = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var hotlistVal = isActive ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = remove, 0 = add

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isActive) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint with hotlist parameter
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                hotlist: hotlistVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function() {
                if (window.location.pathname.indexOf("/hotlist") !== -1) {
                    var $hotlistedSection = $("#hotlistedModelsGrid");
                    var $followedSection = $("#followedModelsGrid");
                    var $emptyState = $("#hotlistEmpty");

                    if (isActive) {
                        if ($followedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $followedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $hotlistedSection.find(".profile-single").length === 0) {
                            if ($emptyState.length) {
                                $emptyState.show();
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $hotlistedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($emptyState.length) {
                            $emptyState.hide();
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isActive) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }

    function toggleFollow(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var isFollowing = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var followVal = isFollowing ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = unfollow, 0 = follow

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isFollowing) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
            $icon.text("+");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
            $icon.text("⭐");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                follow: followVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function(response) {
                // On successful follow, refresh page to move card to "Models You Follow"
                if (!isFollowing) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isFollowing) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                    $icon.text("⭐");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                    $icon.text("+");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }
</script>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        function startRandomVibration() {
            $(".lovense_icon").each(function() {
                var icon = $(this);

                function vibrateIcon() {
                    var delay = Math.random() * 2000 + 1000;
                    // Random delay between 

                    setTimeout(function() {
                        icon.addClass("vibrating");
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            icon.removeClass("vibrating");
                            vibrateIcon();
                            // Schedule the next vibration
                        }, 1000);
                        // Keep vibrating for 1 second
                    }, delay);
                }

                vibrateIcon();
                // Start the first vibration
            });
        }

        startRandomVibration();
    });
</script>
<script>
    function toggleHotlist(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var $card = $icon.closest(".profile-single");
        var isActive = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var hotlistVal = isActive ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = remove, 0 = add

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isActive) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint with hotlist parameter
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                hotlist: hotlistVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function() {
                if (window.location.pathname.indexOf("/hotlist") !== -1) {
                    var $hotlistedSection = $("#hotlistedModelsGrid");
                    var $followedSection = $("#followedModelsGrid");
                    var $emptyState = $("#hotlistEmpty");

                    if (isActive) {
                        if ($followedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $followedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $hotlistedSection.find(".profile-single").length === 0) {
                            if ($emptyState.length) {
                                $emptyState.show();
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        if ($hotlistedSection.length && $card.length) {
                            $hotlistedSection.prepend($card);
                        }
                        if ($emptyState.length) {
                            $emptyState.hide();
                        }
                    }
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isActive) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }

    function toggleFollow(element, uid) {
        return getLoginModal('login');
        var $icon = $(element);
        var isFollowing = $icon.hasClass("active");
        var followVal = isFollowing ? 1 : 0;
        // 1 = unfollow, 0 = follow

        // Optimistic UI update
        if (isFollowing) {
            $icon.removeClass("active");
            $icon.text("+");
        } else {
            $icon.addClass("active");
            $icon.text("⭐");
        }

        // AJAX call to follow endpoint
        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "/ajax.php?followtrigger",
            data: {
                follow: followVal,
                t: uid
            },
            success: function(response) {
                // On successful follow, refresh page to move card to "Models You Follow"
                if (!isFollowing) {
                    location.reload();
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                // Revert on error
                if (isFollowing) {
                    $icon.addClass("active");
                    $icon.text("⭐");
                } else {
                    $icon.removeClass("active");
                    $icon.text("+");
                }
            }
        });
        return false;
    }
</script>
</div></div>

<script>
    /*
						function processImages($elements) {
							devLogger("processImages skipped for new home design");
						}
						*/

    function processImages($elements) {
        $elements.each(function() {
            var $realImage = $(this);

            // Skip if already loaded
            if ($realImage.hasClass("loaded")) {
                return;
                // Continue to next element
            }

            var realSrc = $realImage.attr("src");

            // Create a new image object to load the real image
            var img = new Image();
            img.src = realSrc;
            $realImage.addClass("nodisplay");
            $realImage.css("opacity", 0);

            // When the real image is fully loaded
            $(img).on("load", function() {
                $realImage.attr("src", realSrc);
                $realImage.addClass("loaded");
                $realImage.removeClass("nodisplay");
                $realImage.animate({
                    opacity: 1
                }, 100);

                // Remove the placeholder (if it exists)
                $realImage.siblings(".placeholder_thumbnail").remove();
            });

            // Handle image loading error
            $(img).on("error", function() {
                console.warn("Image failed to load:", realSrc);

                // Remove the placeholder, but keep the image element
                $realImage.siblings(".placeholder_thumbnail").remove();

                // Optionally, set a fallback image
                // $realImage.attr("src", "path/to/fallback-image.jpg").addClass("image-error");
            });
        });
    }
</script>

<script>

    function closeModal() {

        $('body').removeClass('modalopen');
        // devLogger('closeModal 7');
        pauseVideos();
        //$('.videowrapper').hide();
        $('.modal-wrapper-outer').hide();
        //$('.modal-gallery-wrapper-v2').css('visibility', 'hidden');
        //$('.modal-gallery-wrapper-v2').css('z-index', -1);
        //$('.modal-gallery-wrapper-v2').removeClass('nodisplay'); 

        //$('.media-item.thumbnail').css('visibility', 'visible');
    }

    function keyPress(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') {
            closeModal();
        }
    }

    $(document).keyup(function(e) {
        if (e.key === 'Escape') {
            // escape key maps to keycode `27`
            closeModal();
        }
    });

    $(document).ready(function() {
        $('.modal-close').click(function() {
            closeModal();
        });
    });
</script>

<script>

    var pagename = "home";
    var camsstr = "";
    // only cam ids
    var idsstr = "3453,2951734,2936728,2962520,226338,2964044,2952740,201921,2963122,3811,243680,279815,28041,2961448,2956120,2953106";
    // all ids
    var lwc_page = 1;
    // initialise
    var working_loadmore_homepage = 0;

    function twi_livecam_browse(page=1) {

        devLogger("twi_livecam_browse: " + page, idsstr);

        if (working_loadmore_homepage == 0) {
            working_loadmore_homepage = 1;

            var data = "";
            data += "&roomsBrowse";
            data += "&page=" + page;
            data += "&idsstr=" + idsstr;

            // devLogger(data);

            $.ajax({
                type: "GET",
                url: "https://revealme.com/livecam/?ajaxRequest",
                data: data,
                success: function(response) {

                    try {
                        var camsArray = $.parseJSON(response);

                        $(".wrapper_livecam_browse .loading").hide();
                        idsstr = camsArray.idsstr;
                        // store ids to prevent duplicates

                        working_loadmore_homepage = 0;
                        // reset

                        if (page == 1) {
                            if (camsstr != camsArray.camsstr) {
                                camsstr = camsArray.camsstr;
                                // update only livecam 
                            }
                            // $(".wrapper_livecam_browse").html(camsArray.html); // replace
                            $(".wrapper_livecam_browse .sample-box-remove").remove();
                            $(".container-inner-members-wrapper2").append(camsArray.html);
                            // append
                        }

                        if (page > 1) {
                            $(".container-inner-members-wrapper2").append(camsArray.html);
                            // append
                        }

                        if (pagename == "streaming")
                            $("h2.moremodels").html("Online Now");
                        if (pagename == "newmodels")
                            $("h2.moremodels").html("Online Now");

                        checkNewMediaLoaded("twi_livecam_browse");

                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error("Error parsing JSON response:", error);
                        console.error("Raw response:", response);
                    }

                }
            });
        }
        // end working_loadmore_homepage
    }

    // twi_livecam_browse();

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {

        var delayStart = 0;
        if ("home" == "home")
            delayStart = 2000;

        setTimeout(function() {

            const sentinel = document.querySelector(".wrapper_livecam_browse .sentinel");
            if (!sentinel)
                return;

            const observer = new IntersectionObserver( (entries) => {
                entries.forEach(entry => {
                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        if (lwc_page < 2)
                            $(".container-footer").remove();
                        lwc_page++;
                        // twi_livecam_browse(lwc_page);
                    }
                }
                );
            }
            ,{
                rootMargin: "500px 0px 0px 0px"
            });

            observer.observe(sentinel);

        }, delayStart);
    });
</script>

<script>
    function loadRecaptcha() {
        devLogger("loadRecaptcha");
        var script = document.createElement("script");
        script.src = "https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api.js?render=6LcqVsQUAAAAAGi88VIEyeuBlS_15RQBBu3yQFFy";
        script.onload = function() {
            grecaptcha.ready(function() {
                grecaptcha.execute("6LcqVsQUAAAAAGi88VIEyeuBlS_15RQBBu3yQFFy", {
                    action: "contact"
                }).then(function(token) {
                    var recaptchaResponse = document.getElementById("recaptchaResponse");
                    recaptchaResponse.value = token;
                });
            });
        }
        ;
        document.head.appendChild(script);
    }

    function hideLoginModal() {
        $(".modal-payment-wrapper-login").hide();
    }
</script>

                        $(".choose_login_or_join .tab").click(function() {
                            var option = $(this).attr("data-o");
                            $(".modal-login").removeClass("selected_login");
                            $(".modal-login").removeClass("selected_join");

                            $(".modal-login").addClass("selected_" + option);
                            $(".modal-login .entertext").html(option);

                            if (option == "join") {
                                $(".modal-login #id_email_or_user").attr("placeholder", "Email");
                                $(".modal-login #id_email_or_user").attr("type", "email");
                            } else {
                                $(".modal-login #id_email_or_user").attr("placeholder", "Email or Username");
                                $(".modal-login #id_email_or_user").attr("type", "text");
                            }

                        });
                    </script>
                    <div class="loginwith google">
                        <div class="google" style="display:flex; justify-content:center;">
                            <script src="https://accounts.google.com/gsi/client" async defer></script>
                            <div id="g_id_onload" data-client_id="55253144315-efmdvpgklqq7kdhab1n0cdslcmh8tgej.apps.googleusercontent.com" data-callback="handleCredentialResponse" data-auto_prompt="false"></div>
                            <div class="g_id_signin" data-type="standard" data-text="continue_with" data-size="large"></div>
                            <script>
                                function initializeGoogleSignIn() {
                                    google.accounts.id.initialize({
                                        client_id: "55253144315-efmdvpgklqq7kdhab1n0cdslcmh8tgej.apps.googleusercontent.com",
                                        callback: handleCredentialResponse // auto_select: false
                                    });
                                    google.accounts.id.prompt();
                                    // This shows the One Tap prompt
                                }

                                function decodeJwtResponse(token) {
                                    // JWT has three parts: Header, Payload, and Signature
                                    const base64Url = token.split(".")[1];
                                    // Get the Payload
                                    const base64 = base64Url.replace(/-/g, "+").replace(/_/g, "/");
                                    const jsonPayload = decodeURIComponent(atob(base64).split("").map(function(c) {
                                        return "%" + ("00" + c.charCodeAt(0).toString(16)).slice(-2);
                                    }).join(""));

                                    return JSON.parse(jsonPayload);
                                }

                                function handleCredentialResponse(response) {
                                    devLogger("Encoded JWT ID token: " + response.credential);
                                    // Process the ID token and log the user in

                                    const responsePayload = decodeJwtResponse(response.credential);
                                    devLogger("ID: " + responsePayload.sub);
                                    devLogger("Full Name: " + responsePayload.name);
                                    devLogger("Given Name: " + responsePayload.given_name);
                                    devLogger("Family Name: " + responsePayload.family_name);
                                    devLogger("Image URL: " + responsePayload.picture);
                                    devLogger("Email: " + responsePayload.email);

                                    var data = "id_token=" + response.credential;

                                    // check content
                                    $.ajax({
                                        type: "GET",
                                        url: "/ajax.php?glogintokenv2",
                                        data: data,
                                        success: function(resp) {

                                            var arr = $.parseJSON(resp);

                                            if (arr.found == "1") {

                                                localStorage.setItem("googleUserToken", "1");

                                                $(".modal-login").addClass("entering");
                                                $(".modal-inner-login").html("<h3 class=\"enter\">Start Revealing..</h3>");
                                                $(".loginform").hide();
                                                $(".divider").hide();

                                                if (window.exoTrack) {
                                                    exoTrack.registrationComplete();
                                                }

                                                location.reload();
                                                ;

                                            } else if (arr.found == "-1") {

                                                localStorage.setItem("googleUserToken", "1");

                                                $(".modal-login").addClass("entering");
                                                $(".modal-inner-login").html("<h3 class=\"enter\">Start Revealing.</h3>");
                                                $(".loginform").hide();
                                                $(".divider").hide();

                                                if (window.exoTrack) {
                                                    exoTrack.registrationComplete();
                                                }

                                                location.reload();
                                                ;

                                            } else {

                                                googleUser.disconnect();
                                                $.ajax({
                                                    type: "GET",
                                                    url: "/ajax.php?gloginclear"
                                                });

                                                $(".gresult").removeClass("nodisplay");
                                                $(".gresult").html(arr.found);

                                            }

                                        }
                                    });

                                }
                            </script>
                        </div>

                    <div class="modal-inner-login-response">
                        <script>

                            var attempting = 0;

                            function tryLogin_resetFields(btntext) {
                                // devLogger("tryLogin_resetFields");
                                $(".btnsubmit").removeClass("grayscale");
                                $(".btnsubmit").html(btntext);
                                attempting = 0;
                            }

                            function tryLogin() {

                                if (attempting == 0) {

                                    // devLogger("tryLogin");

                                    attempting = 1;
                                    $(".error_ajax").html("");
                                    $(".btnsubmit").addClass("grayscale");
                                    var temp_getButtonText = $(".btnsubmit").html();
                                    $(".btnsubmit").html("Working...");

                                    var u = $("#id_email_or_user").val();
                                    var p = $("#id_password1").val();
                                    var data = "email_or_user=" + u + "&password=" + p;

                                    $.ajax({
                                        type: "GET",
                                        url: "/ajax.php?a_Login",
                                        data: data,
                                        success: function(response) {

                                            if (response == "a_Login_success") {

                                                $(".modal-login").addClass("entering");
                                                $(".modal-inner-login").html("<h3>Start Revealing...</h3>");

                                                if (window.exoTrack) {
                                                    exoTrack.registrationComplete();
                                                }

                                                location.reload();

                                            } else if (response == "a_Create_prompt") {

                                                // check if override set
                                                var submit_type_join = $(".modal-login").hasClass("selected_join") ? 1 : 0;

                                                if (submit_type_join == 1) {
                                                    var promptdesc = 1;
                                                    // skip prompt

                                                    // check email input
                                                    var emailInput = $("#id_email_or_user")[0];
                                                    // Get the raw DOM element
                                                    if (!emailInput.checkValidity()) {
                                                        // If the email is invalid, trigger the browsers validation message
                                                        emailInput.reportValidity();

                                                        // reset
                                                        tryLogin_resetFields(temp_getButtonText);

                                                        return;
                                                        // Stop further execution
                                                    }

                                                } else {
                                                    var str = u + " does not exist\nDo you want to create a new account?";
                                                    var promptdesc = confirm(str, "");
                                                }

                                                if (promptdesc == null || promptdesc == "") {

                                                    // reset
                                                    tryLogin_resetFields(temp_getButtonText);

                                                } else {

                                                    $(".btnsubmit").html("Creating...");

                                                    var usertype = $(".modal-login .choose_type .input_usertype").val();
                                                    data += "&input_usertype=" + usertype;
                                                    data += "&confirmcreate=1";

                                                    $.ajax({
                                                        type: "GET",
                                                        url: "/ajax.php?a_Login",
                                                        data: data,
                                                        success: function(response) {

                                                            $(".modal-inner-login").html("Joining...");

                                                            if (window.exoTrack) {
                                                                exoTrack.registrationComplete();
                                                            }

                                                            if (usertype == "fan") {
                                                                location.reload();
                                                            } else {
                                                                window.location.href = "/dashboard";
                                                            }

                                                        }
                                                    });
                                                }

                                            } else {
                                                $(".error_ajax").html(response);
                                                $(".error_ajax").addClass("haserror");
                                                tryLogin_resetFields(temp_getButtonText);
                                            }
                                        }
                                    });
                                }
                            }

                            $(".btnsubmit").on("click", function() {
                                tryLogin();
                            });

                            $(document).keypress(function(event) {
                                var keycode = (event.keyCode ? event.keyCode : event.which);
                                if (keycode == "13") {
                                    tryLogin();
                                }
                            });
                        </script>
                    </div>
                </div>

<script>
    const scrollContainer = document.querySelector(".page-outer-wrapper");
    const header = document.querySelector(".container-header");

    if (scrollContainer && header) {
        scrollContainer.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
            if (scrollContainer.scrollTop > 0) {
                header.classList.add("blackbg");
            } else {
                header.classList.remove("blackbg");
            }
        }
        );
    } else {
        console.warn("scrollContainer or header not found.");
    }
</script>

<script>
    $("#top").click(function() {
        $(this).html("");
        $(this).addClass("nodisplay");
        // $(".topin").html("");
        $("body").removeClass("zoomImageTop");
    });
</script>
<!-- zoom -->
<script>
    function updateZoomState() {
        const topElement = document.getElementById("top");
        const viewportMeta = document.head.querySelector("meta[name=viewport]");
        const isHidden = topElement.classList.contains("nodisplay");

        if (isHidden) {
            // Disable zooming when #top has .nodisplay
            viewportMeta.setAttribute("content", "width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no");
        } else {
            // Allow zooming when #top does not have .nodisplay
            viewportMeta.setAttribute("content", "width=device-width, initial-scale=1");
        }
    }

    // Initial update
    updateZoomState();

    // Periodically update in case viewport gets reset by browser
    setInterval(updateZoomState, 5000);

    // Prevent pinch zooming when #top has .nodisplay
    function preventPinchZoom(event) {
        const topElement = document.getElementById("top");
        const isHidden = topElement.classList.contains("nodisplay");
        if (isHidden) {
            event.preventDefault();
            updateZoomState();
        }
    }

    // Add gesture event listeners to block pinch zooming when needed
    document.addEventListener("gesturestart", preventPinchZoom, {
        passive: false
    });
    document.addEventListener("gesturechange", preventPinchZoom, {
        passive: false
    });
    document.addEventListener("gestureend", preventPinchZoom, {
        passive: false
    });

    // Use MutationObserver to detect class changes on #top
    const observerTop = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
        mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
            if (mutation.attributeName === "class") {
                updateZoomState();
            }
        });
    }
    );
    observerTop.observe(document.getElementById("top"), {
        attributes: true
    });
</script>
<!-- videos -->
<script>

    // Function to handle video playback based on viewport visibility, but only for videos inside .imgring
    function handleVideos() {
        // Select only videos inside .imgring elements
        const videos = document.querySelectorAll(".imgring video");

        videos.forEach(function(video) {
            const rect = video.getBoundingClientRect();

            if (rect.top >= 0 && rect.bottom <= window.innerHeight) {
                // Play videos in view
                if (video.paused) {
                    video.play();
                }
            } else {
                // Pause videos outside the view
                if (!video.paused) {
                    video.pause();
                }
            }
        });
    }

    // Call the function every 2 seconds
    setInterval(handleVideos, 2000);

    // Also call on scroll for more immediate responsiveness
    window.addEventListener("scroll", throttle(handleVideos, 100));

    // Run the function initially to handle videos that are visible on page load
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", handleVideos);

    // Throttle function to limit how often scroll events trigger the video handling
    function throttle(func, limit) {
        let lastFunc;
        let lastRan;
        return function() {
            const context = this;
            const args = arguments;
            if (!lastRan) {
                func.apply(context, args);
                lastRan = Date.now();
            } else {
                clearTimeout(lastFunc);
                lastFunc = setTimeout(function() {
                    if (Date.now() - lastRan >= limit) {
                        func.apply(context, args);
                        lastRan = Date.now();
                    }
                }, limit - (Date.now() - lastRan));
            }
        }
        ;
    }
</script>
<!-- lazy gif -->
<script>
    function replaceWithGif(imgElement) {
        // Get the GIF URL from the data-gif attribute
        var gifUrl = imgElement.getAttribute("data-gif");

        setTimeout(function() {
            // Create a new Image object for the GIF
            var gifImage = new Image();
            gifImage.src = gifUrl;
            gifImage.width = imgElement.width;
            gifImage.height = imgElement.height;
            gifImage.className = imgElement.className;
            gifImage.alt = imgElement.alt;
            gifImage.title = imgElement.title;

            // When the GIF is fully loaded, replace the JPG
            gifImage.onload = function() {
                // Check if imgElement and its parentNode are still available
                if (imgElement && imgElement.parentNode) {
                    // Swap the GIF image in place of the JPG
                    imgElement.parentNode.replaceChild(gifImage, imgElement);
                } else {
                    console.warn("imgElement or its parentNode is not available for replacement.");
                }
            }
            ;
        }, 1000);
    }
</script>
<script>
    function isLaptop() {
        // Consider devices with screen width >= 1024px as laptops
        return window.innerWidth >= 1024;
    }

    let lazyObserver;

    function initLazyLoadForNewImages() {

        devLogger("initLazyLoadForNewImages");

        const newImages = document.querySelectorAll("img.lazy:not(.observing)");

        newImages.forEach(img => img.classList.add("observing"));

        if (!("IntersectionObserver"in window)) {
            newImages.forEach(function(img) {
                img.src = img.dataset.src;
                img.classList.remove("lazy");
            });
            return;
        }

        if (!lazyObserver) {
            lazyObserver = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
                entries.forEach(function(entry) {

                    const img = entry.target;

                    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                        if (!img.classList.contains("loaded")) {
                            const realSrc = img.dataset.src;

                            const preloader = new Image();
                            preloader.src = realSrc;

                            preloader.onload = function() {
                                img.src = realSrc;
                                img.classList.add("loaded");
                                img.style.opacity = 0;
                                img.style.transition = "opacity 0.3s ease-in";
                                requestAnimationFrame( () => {
                                    img.style.opacity = 1;
                                }
                                );

                            }
                            ;

                            preloader.onerror = function() {
                                console.warn("Failed to load image:", realSrc);
                            }
                            ;
                        }
                    } else {
                        // Unload image when it scrolls far away
                        if (img.classList.contains("loaded") && !isLaptop()) {
                            img.removeAttribute("src");
                            img.classList.remove("loaded");
                            // Optional: fade out
                            img.style.opacity = 0;
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
            ,{
                root: null,
                // use viewport
                rootMargin: "500px",
                // Load and unload 
                threshold: 0.01 // Trigger when 1% of the image is visible
            });
        }

        newImages.forEach(function(img) {
            lazyObserver.observe(img);
        });
    }

    // Use MutationObserver to detect class changes on #top
    const observerLazy3 = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
        if (document.querySelector("img.lazy:not(.observing)")) {
            initLazyLoadForNewImages();
        }
    }
    );
    observerLazy3.observe(document.body, {
        childList: true,
        subtree: true
    });

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        initLazyLoadForNewImages();
        window.initLazyLoadForNewImages = initLazyLoadForNewImages;
    });

    if (isLaptop()) {
        setInterval( () => {
            document.querySelectorAll("img.lazy:not(.loaded)").forEach(img => {
                if (img.dataset.src) {
                    img.src = img.dataset.src;
                    img.classList.add("loaded");
                    img.classList.remove("lazy", "observing");
                    // devLogger("Fallback loaded image", img);
                }
            }
            );
        }
        , 1000);
        // x seconds after page load
    }
</script>

<!-- 2025-03-30 iframe video lazy load -->
<script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        const observer = new IntersectionObserver( (entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                const iframe = entry.target;

                if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                    if (!iframe.src || iframe.dataset.unloaded === "true") {
                        iframe.src = iframe.dataset.src;
                        iframe.dataset.unloaded = "false";
                    }
                } else {
                    if (iframe.src) {
                        iframe.removeAttribute("src");
                        iframe.dataset.unloaded = "true";
                    }
                }
            }
            );
        }
        ,{
            rootMargin: "0px",
            threshold: 0.3
        });

        const alreadyObserved = new WeakSet();

        const watchForNewIframes = () => {
            const lazyIframes = document.querySelectorAll(".videoLazyLoad1 iframe[data-src]");
            lazyIframes.forEach( (iframe) => {
                if (!alreadyObserved.has(iframe)) {
                    observer.observe(iframe);
                    alreadyObserved.add(iframe);
                }
            }
            );
        }
        ;

        // Initial run
        watchForNewIframes();

        // Re-check every second for newly added iframes (e.g. from "Load More")
        setInterval(watchForNewIframes, 1000);
        // adjust interval if needed
    });
</script>
<script>

    (function() {
        // ---- CONFIG ----
        const GOALS = {
            visit_home: '39da1a21685432cd810218006a2245ea',
            // Pixel
            view_register_form: 'c296539c4a06d5ab3cd50e53b97ec237',
            // Pixel (once per user)
            view_topup_popup: '42ced017100ebe6cfcf22517f5085214',
            // Pixel (once per user)

            registration_complete: '77cc23deb1152cc0b3ecdc575ed42079',
            purchase_conversion: 'ca18b04b6de276cab7a4325d86f08473'
        };

        // Only track users who came via ExoClick (i.e., have an exocid)
        const REQUIRE_CLICK_ID = true;

        // ---- CLICK ID DETECTION & STORAGE ----
        const CLICK_PARAM = 'exotracker';
        const CLICK_COOKIE = 'exo_click_id';

        function getParam(name) {
            const m = new RegExp('[?&]' + name + '=([^&]+)').exec(location.search);
            return m ? decodeURIComponent(m[1].replace(/\+/g, ' ')) : null;
        }

        function getCookie(name) {
            const m = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(^|; )' + name + '=([^;]*)'));
            return m ? decodeURIComponent(m[2]) : null;
        }

        function setCookie(name, val, days) {
            const d = new Date();
            d.setTime(d.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
            document.cookie = name + '=' + encodeURIComponent(val) + '; path=/; expires=' + d.toUTCString();
        }

        let clickId = getParam(CLICK_PARAM) || getCookie(CLICK_COOKIE) || null;
        if (clickId)
            setCookie(CLICK_COOKIE, clickId, 30);
        // persist for attribution window
        function hasClickId() {
            return !!clickId;
        }

        // ---- SAFE STORAGE HELPERS ----
        const ls = (function() {
            try {
                return window.localStorage;
            } catch (e) {
                return {
                    getItem() {},
                    setItem() {}
                };
            }
        }
        )();
        const ss = (function() {
            try {
                return window.sessionStorage;
            } catch (e) {
                return {
                    getItem() {},
                    setItem() {}
                };
            }
        }
        )();

        // ---- CORE FIRE (idempotent) ----
        // keyScope ensures de-dupe can be per-click or global.
        function firePixelOnce(goalId, key, keyScope) {
            if (!goalId)
                return;
            if (REQUIRE_CLICK_ID && !hasClickId())
                return;

            const scope = keyScope === 'per_click' && clickId ? `_${clickId}` : '';
            const k = `exo_${goalId}_${key}${scope}`;
            if (ls.getItem(k))
                return;

            // double-guard: in-memory debounce for rapid calls
            if (!window.__exo_fired)
                window.__exo_fired = {};
            if (window.__exo_fired[k])
                return;
            window.__exo_fired[k] = 1;

            const s = document.createElement('script');
            s.src = 'https://a.magsrv.com/tag_gen.js';
            s.async = true;
            s.setAttribute('data-goal', goalId);
            s.onload = function() {
                try {
                    ls.setItem(k, String(Date.now()));
                } catch (e) {}
            }
            ;
            // If body isn't ready yet, queue for DOMContentLoaded
            const inject = () => (document.body || document.head || document.documentElement).appendChild(s);
            if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', inject);
            } else {
                inject();
            }
        }

        // ---- PUBLIC API (use these in your app) ----
        window.exoTrack = {
            // Auto-call this on DOM ready if you want first session home view tracked
            visitHomeFirstInSession: function() {
                if (!hasClickId() && REQUIRE_CLICK_ID)
                    return;
                if (!ss.getItem('exo_home_seen')) {
                    firePixelOnce(GOALS.visit_home, 'home_first_session', 'per_click');
                    ss.setItem('exo_home_seen', '1');
                }
            },

            // Call once when your register form actually becomes visible (e.g., modal open)
            viewRegisterFormOnce: function() {
                firePixelOnce(GOALS.view_register_form, 'view_register_form_once', 'per_click');
            },

            // Call once when your topup/credit popup is shown (not purchase)
            viewTopupPopupOnce: function() {
                firePixelOnce(GOALS.view_topup_popup, 'view_topup_popup_once', 'per_click');
            },

            registrationComplete: function() {
                firePixelOnce(GOALS.registration_complete, 'registration_complete_once', 'per_click');
            },

            /*
				purchaseConversion: function() {
				  firePixelOnce(GOALS.purchase_conversion, 'purchase_conversion', 'per_click');
				},
				*/

            // Placeholders: keep S2S as source of truth; don’t pixel these if you also postback S2S.
            // Call your server here if you want a unified helper.
            accountCreated: function() {/* S2S on server; no pixel here to avoid double counting */
            },
            purchaseSuccess: function() {/* S2S on server; no pixel here to avoid double counting */
            },

            // Utility (optional): true if this visitor has exocid
            hasClickId: hasClickId
        };

        // ---- AUTO-FIRE: home on first visit in session ----
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            window.exoTrack.visitHomeFirstInSession();
        });
    }
    )();
</script>

<script>

    // Function to show manual installation instructions
    function showManualInstallInstructions() {
        document.getElementById("install-pwa-instructions").classList.remove("nodisplay");
    }

    function isIos() {
        return /iphone|ipad|ipod/.test(window.navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase());
    }

    // Function to detect if the app is in standalone mode
    function isInStandaloneMode() {
        return ('standalone'in window.navigator) && (window.navigator.standalone);
    }

    let deferredPrompt;
    let installDismissed = localStorage.getItem('installDismissed') === 'true';
    const installButton = document.getElementById('install-pwa-button');

    // Hide the install button if running in standalone mode
    if (window.matchMedia('(display-mode: standalone)').matches) {
        installButton.style.display = 'none';
    }

    // Show the installation instructions for iOS if not already installed
    if (isIos() && !isInStandaloneMode()) {
        installButton.style.display = 'flex';

        $("#install-pwa-button").click(function(event) {
            event.stopPropagation();
            // Prevent the event from bubbling up
            $(".modal-getapp").removeClass("nodisplay");
            // Show the modal
        });

        // Handle clicks on the document
        $(document).click(function(event) {
            // Check if the clicked element is outside the modal-content
            if (!$(event.target).closest(".modal-inner-getapp").length && !$(event.target).is("#install-pwa-button")) {
                $(".modal-getapp").addClass("nodisplay");
            }
        });

    }

    if (!isIos()) {
        // Show the install button when the beforeinstallprompt event is fired
        window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', (e) => {
            // Prevent the mini-infobar from appearing on mobile
            e.preventDefault();

            // If the user has already dismissed the prompt, don't show the install button
            if (installDismissed) {
                return;
            }

            // Stash the event so it can be triggered later
            deferredPrompt = e;

            // Show the install button
            installButton.style.display = 'flex';
        }
        );

        // Handle the install button click
        installButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (deferredPrompt) {
                // Show the install prompt
                deferredPrompt.prompt();

                // Wait for the user to respond to the prompt
                deferredPrompt.userChoice.then( (choiceResult) => {
                    if (choiceResult.outcome === 'accepted') {
                        installButton.style.display = 'none';
                        devLogger('User accepted the install prompt');
                    } else {
                        devLogger('User dismissed the install prompt');
                    }
                    // Reset the deferredPrompt variable to null after prompting
                    deferredPrompt = null;
                }
                );
            } else {
                // If the deferredPrompt is not available, show manual installation instructions
                showManualInstallInstructions();
            }
        }
        );
    }
    // Handle the close button click to dismiss the prompt and hide the install button
    document.querySelector('#install-pwa-button .close').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        // Prevent the click event from bubbling up
        installButton.style.display = 'none';
        // Hide the install button
        installDismissed = true;
        // Mark the prompt as dismissed
        localStorage.setItem('installDismissed', 'true');
        // Persist the dismissal state
    }
    );
</script>

    if ('serviceWorker'in navigator) {
        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            navigator.serviceWorker.register('/service-worker.js').then( (registration) => {
                devLogger('Service Worker registered with scope:', registration.scope);
            }
            ).catch( (error) => {
                console.error('Service Worker registration failed:', error);
            }
            );
        }
        );
    }
</script>
